posts.text: Wow, my brother sent me this photo of a bear from a site in northern BC (near Quesnel) - that is one heifer of a black bear

The @verge Vergecast switched to daily weekday episodes and I’m loving it. The episodes are shorter and more timely in a way that I find makes it easier to keep up with. You’re doing great work @imdavidpierce @vicmsong @reckless1280 and crew!
